## Meeting Purpose

[Review and discuss GrowthX's updated brand identity and visual design elements with Noboringdesign team.](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Renato positively received the subtle logo adjustments and new color direction, particularly the addition of yellow](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Iconography style needs refinement to better balance with the logo design](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Photography style and subject matter require further discussion and definition](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Renato will provide detailed feedback via Loom after discussing with his team](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

## Topics

### Brand Identity Updates

  - [Logo refinements: Subtle adjustments made to the 'X' in the isotipo, unifying elements](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Wordmark: Maintained original thickness and proportions with minor adjustments to 'R' and 'W' for a more contemporary, geometric look](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Color palette: Increased use of white (50% of compositions), with accent colors for contrast and highlighting key information](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Typography: Exclusively using Rethink font, inspired by modernist sans-serif typefaces](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Iconography: Geometric, minimalist style inspired by Bauhaus modernist logos (needs further refinement)](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

### Key Visual Elements

  - [Data visualization: Incorporated geometric elements for an visually interesting representation](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - Grid system: Geometric grid from concept \#1 used to structure and unify design elements
  - [Photography: Analog-style black and white images of people in context (style TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Color accents: Blue used for CTAs, buttons, and to differentiate information hierarchies](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

### Web Design Applications

  - [Hero section: Adapted current content to new graphic style, featuring prominent headline, subheader, and visualized data](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [How it works: Redesigned menu structure using the new grid system and color accents](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Pricing plans: Updated layout with specific information accessible through navigation menus](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)

### Social Media Ads

  - [Flexible system allowing for various combinations of elements (photography, data, CTAs)](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Adapted key visual elements to smaller format while maintaining brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Renato to share presentation internally with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Renato to provide consolidated feedback via Loom, including:](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [Detailed comments on overall design direction](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
      - [Input on color balance and prominence](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Suggestions for refining iconography style](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
      - [Ideas and concepts for photography style and situations to depict](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Noboringdesign team to await feedback before proceeding with further refinements](https://fathom.video/share/vvxk_GpRAts7rNZQ13cJ5D3RXkzxHbMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
